description: A fresco bust portrait of a bearded man wearing a classical military helmet with a feathered plume and a draped cloak over armor. He has a strong, stern expression and looks slightly to the side. Behind him, ornate classical architectural decoration with scrollwork and acanthus leaves frames the figure. The painting is in warm earth tones with some wear typical of aged fresco. The style suggests a Renaissance idealization of an ancient warrior or biblical hero.
